instruction:
## f2 · Implement the Sprint Feature

Workspace: `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room`

### Goal
Implement the feature selected in SPRINT_DECISION.md. Commit incrementally.
Never accumulate broken tests.

### Step 1 — Read the Brief
Read `SPRINT_DECISION.md` completely before writing a single line of code.
Understand every acceptance criterion.

### Step 2 — Create Feature Branch
```
cd C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room
.venv\Scripts\activate
git checkout main && git pull origin main
git checkout -b <branch name from SPRINT_DECISION.md>
```

### Step 3 — Implement File by File
Follow `## Files to Change` exactly:
  - After EACH file edit: run `pytest tests/ -q` — fix any red test immediately
  - Commit after each meaningful chunk:
    `git commit -m 'feat(<scope>): <imperative description>'`

### Code Standards (enforced — no exceptions)
  - Type hints on every parameter and return value
  - Function body ≤ 40 lines — split if longer
  - No `print()` — use `logging.getLogger(__name__)`
  - No magic numbers — define named constants at top of file
  - Every new public function: one-line docstring
  - No bare `except:` — always catch specific exception types

### If the Feature Touches Scraping Pipeline
  - Update `config.example.json` with any new config keys (with defaults)
  - Never touch `config.json` (live credentials)
  - If adding a new scraper source: add it to the `## Sources` section of guidance.md

### Step 4 — Final Test Run
```
.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short
```
All tests must pass. Record the total pass count for f3.
